description: A vibrant post-impressionist landscape depicting the Lot River at Saint-Cirq-Lapopie in southern France. Steep, pale limestone cliffs rise dramatically on the left, their surfaces catching purple and golden light. The river flows through the center of the composition in rich reddish-brown tones, reflecting the cliffs and sky. Lush green meadows line both banks. The sky above is rendered in soft lavender and blue with thick, textured brushwork characteristic of Henri Martin's divisionist technique. The entire scene pulses with color and light.
